---
title: "Intertemporal Choice"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="coming-soon-page">
  <div class="coming-soon-inner">
    <span class="coming-soon-icon">⏳</span>
    <h1>Intertemporal Choice</h1>
    <p class="coming-soon-sub">Serotonin and delay discounting in mice.</p>
    <p class="coming-soon-note">Page coming soon &mdash; <em>Current Biology</em> 2017.</p>
    <a href="https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/28988863/" target="_blank" class="pub-fig-link">
      <img src="images/pubs/xu2017fig1.jpg" class="pub-fig" alt="Xu et al. 2017 Figure 1 — Current Biology">
    </a>
  </div>
</div>
```
